name: Ranchera Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. HEAT THE LARD IN A STOCK POT, ADD THE GARLIC AND SAUTE OVER MEDIUM HEAT.
UNTIL LIGHT BROWN (ABOUT 5 MINUTES). ADD THE WATER.
2. ADD THE TOMATO PASTE, CHICKEN BASE, SALT AND SPICES, STIRRING UNTIL
THE TOMATO PASTE IS COMPLETELY DISSOLVED. BRING TO A BOIL AND SIMMER ON LOW
FOR ABOUT 20 MINUTES.
3. RANCHERA ROUX: WHEN THE SAUCE HAS ALMOST FINISHED SIMMERING, MELT THE LARD IN
A SAUCEPAN AND ADD THE FLOUR, STIRRING CONSTANTLY OVER MEDIAN HEAT UNTIL THE MIXTURE IS LIGHT BROWN (ABOUT 5 MINUTES).
4. SLOWLY ADD THE ROUX TO THE SAUCE, WHIPPING CONSTANTLY TO DISSOLVE THE ROUX
INTO THE SAUCE WITHOUT LUMPING.
5. ADD THE VEGETABLES AND RETURN THE SAUCE TO A BOIL. SIMMER FOR ANOTHER 20
MINUTES OVER LOW HEAT. GOOD ON THE RICE AND OTHER MEXICAN DISHES.
